---
title: "BoredEngineer"
---

<div id="vanta-canvas" style="position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; z-index: -1;"></div>

<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/three.js/r134/three.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/vanta@latest/dist/vanta.net.min.js"></script>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  let vantaEffect = null;

  function getVantaOptions() {
    const isDark = document.body.classList.contains('quarto-dark');
    return {
      el: "#vanta-canvas",
      mouseControls: true,
      touchControls: true,
      gyroControls: false,
      minHeight: 200.00,
      minWidth: 200.00,
      scale: 1.00,
      scaleMobile: 1.00,
      color: 0x3d95ce,
      backgroundColor: isDark ? 0x1a1a1a : 0xffffff,
      points: 30.00,
      maxDistance: 20.00,
      spacing: 15.00,
      showDots: true
    };
  }

  function initVanta() {
    const options = getVantaOptions();
    if (vantaEffect) {
      vantaEffect.destroy();
    }
    vantaEffect = VANTA.NET(options);
  }

  // Initial init
  initVanta();

  // Watch for theme changes
  const observer = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) {
    mutations.forEach(function(mutation) {
      if (mutation.type === 'attributes' && mutation.attributeName === 'class') {
        initVanta();
      }
    });
  });

  observer.observe(document.body, {
    attributes: true,
    attributeFilter: ['class']
  });
});
</script>

::: {.column-screen .hero-content style="text-align: center; padding-top: 15vh; background: transparent;"}
# Welcome to BoredEngineer

This is a Quarto website featuring a complex network animation.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.
:::
